objective: Demo skill that runs the cursor-warp-free Notes flow with the dual-cursor overlay enabled on every AX step. The user cursor stays put (`you` slate sprite at the real hardware position); the AUV cursor (cyan + lime pixel sprite, `auv · replay` pill) animates to each AX target, flashes the cursor-auv-click burst at the moment of press/focus, and disappears. Designed as the canonical visual demonstration of the AUV design system's 'ghost dual cursor' contract.

focus_candidate.note: Optional serialized contract::Candidate for promoted native-text validation. Falls back to the hard-coded query when empty.

overlay_preview_ms.note: How long the dual cursors stay visible before the AX action fires. Longer values make the demo easier to read; 250ms is the production default elsewhere.

overlay_settle_ms.note: How long the auv-click flash stays after the AX action before hide.

preconditions: 备忘录 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
A human is watching the screen — otherwise the dual cursor visual has no purpose.

notes: Same contract as macos.notes.create_and_verify_note.v2 — every AX step asserts cursorDisturbance=none. The dual cursor overlay is presentation-only; it does not touch the hardware cursor.
Top-level max_disturbance is clipboard because paste-note-body uses the clipboard. The AX press + AX focus steps both stay at keyboard.

steps.purpose: Press the Notes 新建备忘录 toolbar button via AXUIElementPerformAction while the dual cursor overlay animates the auv replay cursor to the button.
Focus the note body via AXUIElementSetAttributeValue(kAXFocusedAttribute) while the dual cursor overlay animates the auv replay cursor to the text area.
Write the demo marker into the note body through the clipboard.
Verify the demo marker through the AX tree.

expected_signals: Both AX steps emit cursorDisturbance=none + overlayPresentation=dual-cursor-visual-only + dualCursor=true.
The user cursor never moves; the auv replay cursor animates to each target and flashes a click burst before the AX action completes.
A new Notes note is created with the demo marker, verifiable through the AX tree.
success_criteria: create-note + focus-body both pass their cursorDisturbance / overlay signal_equals assertions.
The demo marker is present in the note body's AX subtree.
No step warps the hardware cursor.
non_goals: This recipe is not a contract for Notes itself; it is a recipe for the dual-cursor presentation contract on top of an already-validated Notes flow.
This recipe does not assert on the visual fidelity of the overlay (pixel sprite, pill color, animation duration); that is the design-system layer's responsibility, not the recipe runner's.

known_limits.human_required: The whole point is for a human to watch. Running this in CI with no display yields the same JSON artifacts as macos.notes.create_and_verify_note.v2 but no visual.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run concurrently with another Notes recipe against the same live app instance.
known_limits.overlay_visual_drift: If docs/design/assets/cursor-auv*.svg changes after this recipe lands, the visual will drift even though the JSON contract remains correct.
